title: jasminum annamense subsp. kerrii
intro: Jasminum annamense subsp. kerrii, also known as Kerrii jasmine, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the jasmine family, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Kerrii jasmine include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression, as well as its ability to protect against cancer and cardiovascular diseases. Kerrii jasmine can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
